song.title: In the Heart of Jesus
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) In the heart of Jesus There is love for you, Love most pure and tender, Love most deep and true;|| Why should you be lonely, Why for friendship sigh, When the heart of Jesus Has a full supply?
[V2] 2) In the mind of Jesus There is thought for you, Warm as summer sunshine, Sweet as morning dew;|| Why should you be fearful, Why take anxious thought, Since the mind of Jesus Cares for those He bought?
[V3] 3) In the field of Jesus There is work for you; Such as even angels might rejoice to do; Why stand idly sighing|| For some lifework grand, While the field of Jesus Seeks your reaping hand?
[V4] 4) In the church of Jesus There’s a place for you; Glorious, bright, and joyous, Right and peaceful too;|| Why then, like a wand’rer, Roam with weary pace, If the church of Jesus Holds for you a place?
song.author: Alice M. Pugh
